name: Black Cohosh Actaea racemosa
summary: Black Cohosh centers on the root; rhizome.
description: Black Cohosh centers on the root; rhizome. Key reported compounds include triterpene glycosides (actein, 23-epi-26-deoxyactein); cimifugoside; caffeic acid derivatives; fukinolic acid.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
